info.name: Spherekings Marketplace & Affiliate System API
info.description: Complete API collection for testing the Spherekings Marketplace backend with authentication, products, cart, checkout, orders, affiliates, commissions, and admin features.

item.name: Auth
item.description: User authentication and account management endpoints

request.description: Login user and receive JWT token

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Sphere of Kings Board Game",
  "description": "Premium board game with exquisite components and premium quality pieces. Perfect for family game nights and serious board gamers.",
  "price": 79.99,
  "images": [
    "https://res.cloudinary.com/demo/image/upload/v1/board-game-1.jpg"
  ],
  "category": "Board Games",
  "stock": 100,
  "sku": "SOK-001",
  "isFeatured": true
}

request.description: Create a new product (Admin only). Required fields: name, description (min 20 chars), price, images (array), stock. Optional: category, sku, isFeatured
Update quantity of item in cart
Create a checkout session for cart items
Calculate shipping cost based on location
Create a new order from cart items
Register current user as an affiliate
